resources.string: An energetic new beginning starts. Silence carries unlimited potential.
The first impulses of a new cycle become noticeable.
Silence and intuition connect in a gentle way.
Creative thoughts arise from inner calm.
Change quietly announces itself in the background.
Emotional balance seeks a new expression.
Spiritual awareness opens itself in stillness.
New energy shapes the beginning of a path.
Thoughts and intuition strengthen each other.
A new stage of development emerges in the background.
Transformation begins on a subtle level.
Inner wisdom sends its first signals.
A cycle approaches its energetic completion.
Past and future meet in the present moment.
Harmony intensifies on an emotional level.
Structure and balance support your path.
Spiritual guidance works in the background.
An old state begins to dissolve.
Spiritual and creative energies connect intensely.
